identifier.description: Stable, URL/code-safe identifier used for cross-references and namespacing. Letters, digits, underscore, dash; must start with a letter or underscore.

scalar.description: A primitive value: string, number, boolean, or null.

color.description: CSS color, typically a hex string like "#1f77b4".

byteOrder.description: Bit/byte ordering. Canonical values are `little_endian` (Intel) and `big_endian` (Motorola / sawtooth). startBit numbering follows the cantools/DBC convention — see mdc-overview.md.

signalKind.description: Raw bit-field interpretation: unsigned/signed two's-complement integer or IEEE-754 float.

transport.description: Frame transport. `single` = one CAN(-FD) frame; `isotp` = ISO 15765-2 segmented; `multiframe` = other application-layer multi-frame assembly.
